description: Three critical microservices in the 'financial-ops' namespace ('ledger-writer', 'risk-analyzer', and 'compliance-api') are stuck mid-rollout during a deployment upgrade. Resolve the deadlocks by modifying the deployment specifications to ensure all three deployments successfully finish their rollouts and only 'v2' pods are running. Do not modify the namespace ResourceQuota. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
